EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} failed to send a message to the address {object.value}. Reason: {reason}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} sent a message to the address {object.value}
A user from host {src.host} sent a message to the address {object.value}
A user from host {src.host} failed to send a message. Reason: {reason}
A user from host {src.host} failed to send a message to the address {object.value}. Reason: {reason}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} failed to send a message. Reason: {reason}
